options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal_mode
options.description: Goal selection

options.name: goal_unlocked_from_start
options.description: Unlocks goal receptions on start

options.name: boe_mode
options.description:
Chaos:
BoE drops are fully random

Balanced:
Burning more boes = higher chapter rewards, starting from canard + urban myth pool

options.name: boe_tiering
options.description:
Select what pages will occur in boe drop pool

Downtier:
Only pages below goal are obtainable

Sametier:
Pages from goal receptions can be obtained

Uptier:
Sametier + pages from receptions higher than goal can be obtained (equal to sametier if goal = hana)

Uptier+:
Same as Uptier, but Oliver, Ensemble and Black Silence pages are obtainable

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: incoming_death_link_mode
options.description:
Select what happens when a Death Link is received from another player.

Lose Reception:
Instantly defeats the current reception.

Kill Random Librarian:
Kills one random librarian on the current floor.

options.name: outgoing_death_link_mode
options.description:
Select when this client sends Death Link to other players.

On Reception Loss:
Send when the current reception is lost.

On Librarian Death:
Send when a librarian on the current floor dies.

options.name: randomize_combat_page_dice
options.description: Randomize dice between regular combat pages.

options.name: randomize_ego_combat_page_dice
options.description: Randomize dice between EGO pages.

options.name: randomize_key_page_stats
options.description: Randomize key page stats such as HP, SR, speed and Dmg resists.

options.name: randomize_key_page_passives
options.description:
Randomize regular key page passives, that can be transfered.

Untransferable passives is locked on its key pages and isn't randomized.

options.name: randomize_boss_exclusive_passives
options.description:
Disabled:
Boss-exclusives stay on their original bosses and are excluded from the randomizer pool.

Enabled:
Boss-exclusives are treated as regular randomizable passives,
except for hard-preserved boss passives that must never be removed.

options.name: randomize_combat_page_passives
options.display_name: Randomize combat pages passives (Does nothing rn)
options.description: Experimental combat page passive randomization.

options.name: randomize_unique_key_page_passives
options.display_name: Randomize Key Pages untransferable passives (Does nothing rn)
options.description: Randomize untransferable passives
